case_title: ANALISA BELLI VS. ALLSTATE INDEMNITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLI, ANALISA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INDEMNITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE WAS NOT FILED WITHIN THE STATUTE PERIOD OF 3 YEARS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ERNIE BODEN--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,850.00 FILED BY BELLI, ANALISA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
